creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 179884
New port .shar

The Averia GWF families of fonts are based on the average of all fonts
in the Google Web Fonts project, released under the SIL Open Font License.

Averia GWF exists in Regular, Bold, Italic, Bold Italic, Light and Light
Italic styles

The creation process is described at:
http://iotic.com/averia/
